2026-05-04_strategy.rationale: This domain is chosen because it appears in the context of trendiness in hiring and building AI data analyst, implying a need for efficient automation tools that can be set up by anyone, and it addresses the specific SMB pain point of wasting time on manual tasks, which is a major concern for businesses with limited staff and resources.
